replies.msg:
睇完都唔知講乜
節奏又慢
對白又好普通

Happy New Year, I hope all your dreams come true in 2020- onwards and upwards! Have you made any New Year's resolutions? My cousin's New Year resolution is to have a girlfriend. My friend Joe is a Taurus while his girlfriend is a Leo. Joe along with many other people had a press conference yesterday but it was delayed for three and a half hours. As time went by tempers flared and harsh words were exchanged. Violence flared as they scuffled. Several people who dressed in flared jeans were injured in scuffles with the security guards. Even some of the security guards were injured as fighting flared up. Joe went back home before the press conference started because he had a barbecue party at his house. Some of his friends spilt too much oil when they were barbecuing the steaks causing the barbecue to flare up. There were a sudden flare as his friends were barbecuing some chicken. As time went by the sky was getting darker so they began lighting candles. Some of the candles flared then flickered. Others flickered and went out. Joe let off the fireworks. His sister Amy helped set off the fireworks too. Everyone else stood there admiring the flares of the fireworks. Amy has lots of clothes in her wardrobe such as a formal dress that flares out into a train, a pair of flares that flares at the ankle, a skirt that flares just above the knee, a pair of chinos that flares just above the ankle and a skirt with flares. After three hours the news conference finally began during which at one point threatened to flare into a lawsuit. Half an hour later the conflict quieted down but trouble began to flare in several other districts simultaneously. Both Joe and Amy have a breezy smile and a breezy personality. They're both an easy-going type of person. I like their breezy manner.
